name: Mexican Appetizer Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. In a large bowl beat cream cheese, chicken bouillon, hot pepper sauce and chili powder until smooth.
3. Add eggs and hot water; mix well.
4. Stir in chopped chicken and chilies.
5. Pour into a 9 inch springform pan, bake for 30 minutes or until set; cool for 15 minutes.
6. Carefully run a knife around the edge of pan and remove sides.
7. Top with salsa, cheese and green onions.
